description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, mesh panels on the front, sides, sleeves and back, graphic print on the front and graphic print of brand logo on the back Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Add oodles of style to your training sessions in this blue T-shirt from puma. The graphic print on the front adds an interesting detail, while the polyester fabric with moisture management keeps you feeling dry and comfortable on extended training sessions. Team this with tracks or training shorts. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18”
